name: SOLIGENIX, INC.
summary: Soligenix, Inc. is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing products for rare diseases with unmet medical needs. It operates two segments: Specialized BioTherapeutics (HyBryte for CTCL, SGX302 for psoriasis, dusquetide for Behcet's Disease and oral mucositis) and Public Health Solutions (RiVax ricin vaccine, SGX943 for infectious disease, filovirus vaccines, CiVax for COVID-19), leveraging its proprietary ThermoVax heat stabilization platform with government funding support.

products.name: HyBryte (SGX301)
products.description: Topical synthetic hypericin photodynamic therapy activated by visible light for cutaneous T-cell lymphoma treatment.

products.name: SGX302
products.description: Synthetic hypericin formulation in Phase 2a clinical trial for mild-to-moderate psoriasis treatment.

products.name: SGX945
products.description: Dusquetide IDR therapy in Phase 2a for aphthous ulcers in Behcet's Disease.

products.name: SGX942
products.description: Dusquetide IDR therapy evaluated in Phase 3 for oral mucositis in head and neck cancer patients.

products.name: RiVax
products.description: Ricin toxin vaccine candidate with completed Phase 1 trials demonstrating safety and neutralizing antibodies.

products.name: ThermoVax
products.description: Proprietary heat stabilization platform technology applied to ricin, Ebola, and Marburg virus vaccine programs.

products.name: SGX943
products.description: Pre-clinical therapeutic candidate for antibiotic-resistant and emerging infectious diseases.

products.name: CiVax
products.description: Vaccine candidate for prevention of COVID-19 caused by SARS-CoV-2.

partnerships.partner_name: National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID)
partnerships.description: Government funding support for Public Health Solutions segment vaccine and infectious disease programs.

partnerships.partner_name: Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority (BARDA)
partnerships.description: Government contract/grant funding for public health vaccine and biodefense development programs.
Government funding support for public health biodefense programs including filovirus vaccines.
Collaborative relationship in support of CTCL patient community and HyBryte development.
Collaborative relationship supporting rare disease awareness related to CTCL program.
